task_yaml.task:
A friend hummed a few lyrics to me but I'm not sure which songs they
are. Can you look them up? I'd also like to cross-check the metadata
between NetEase Cloud Music and YouTube to see if the durations match.

The lyrics are at the end, labeled A, B, and C.

For each song, first confirm the title and original artist — no cover
versions. Then look it up on both NetEase Cloud Music and YouTube.
For NetEase, note the song_id, album, and duration. For YouTube, find
the official MV (prefer the artist's own channel or the record label's
channel, not fan re-uploads), and note the video_id, channel, duration,
and upload date. Finally compare the durations from both sides — within
5 seconds I'll consider it a match.

Use ncm-cli for NetEase lookups, and yt-dlp for YouTube search and
metadata.

Give me a JSON summarizing all three songs' cross-references at
/tmp_workspace/results/song_identification.json, plus a brief Chinese
report.md discussing the results — which song matched best across both
platforms, which has the most cover versions, that sort of observation.

Lyrics:

  A: 缘分让我们相遇乱世以外,命运却要我们危难中相爱
  B: 人潮内愈文静愈变得不受理睬
  C: 我和我最後的倔強,握緊雙手絕對不放
